name: Chilaquiles
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Lean ground meat or turkey
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut tortillas into 1-inch squares.
2. Fry or bake the tortilla squares in an oven until they are light brown and crisp. If frying, drain them afterward.
3. In a pan, sauté onions, garlic, and green pepper until tender.
4. Add the meat to the pan and stir until it is well cooked.
5. Stir in the tomato sauce.
6. Add the tortilla squares, salt, and chili powder.
7. Transfer the mixture to a casserole dish and sprinkle with cheese.
8. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit until hot and the cheese is melted.
9. Serve and garnish with sliced ripe olives if desired.
I hope you enjoy this as it is a hit with our family.
